isolation.mysql: mreviewer on 127.0.0.1:3306 via docker exec mreviewer-mysql

assertions.title: Valid webhook with correct token is accepted
Webhook with missing or wrong token is rejected
Unknown event type is accepted but ignored
Duplicate webhook does not produce duplicate comments

frictions.description: The host environment does not provide a mysql CLI binary, so DB evidence had to be collected with `docker exec mreviewer-mysql mysql ...` against the assigned local MySQL container.
frictions.resolution: Used the running mreviewer-mysql container only for read-only SELECT queries scoped to curl-auth-dedupe identifiers.

docker exec mreviewer-mysql mysql -umreviewer -pmreviewer_password -D mreviewer -Nse 'SELECT JSON_OBJECT('"'"'delivery_key'"'"', delivery_key, '"'"'hook_source'"'"', hook_source, '"'"'event_type'"'"', event_type, '"'"'project_id'"'"', project_id, '"'"'mr_iid'"'"', mr_iid, '"'"'action'"'"', action, '"'"'head_sha'"'"', head_sha, '"'"'verification_outcome'"'"', verification_outcome, '"'"'rejection_reason'"'"', rejection_reason) FROM hook_events WHERE delivery_key = '"'"'curl-auth-dedupe-valid-001'"'"';'

docker exec mreviewer-mysql mysql -umreviewer -pmreviewer_password -D mreviewer -Nse 'SELECT JSON_OBJECT('"'"'id'"'"', rr.id, '"'"'status'"'"', rr.status, '"'"'head_sha'"'"', rr.head_sha, '"'"'hook_event_id'"'"', rr.hook_event_id, '"'"'idempotency_key'"'"', rr.idempotency_key) FROM review_runs rr JOIN projects p ON rr.project_id = p.id JOIN merge_requests mr ON rr.merge_request_id = mr.id WHERE p.gitlab_project_id = 991101 AND mr.mr_iid = 7001 ORDER BY rr.id;'

docker exec mreviewer-mysql mysql -umreviewer -pmreviewer_password -D mreviewer -Nse 'SELECT JSON_OBJECT('"'"'delivery_key'"'"', delivery_key, '"'"'hook_source'"'"', hook_source, '"'"'verification_outcome'"'"', verification_outcome, '"'"'rejection_reason'"'"', rejection_reason, '"'"'detail'"'"', detail) FROM audit_logs WHERE delivery_key = '"'"'curl-auth-dedupe-valid-001'"'"' ORDER BY id;'
